task.goal: Bootstrap repo, submodule, and `.planning/` contract on `main`.
Maintain PRD + roadmap alignment (Payload template, Supabase PG, Vercel, three seed emails).
Document EngageBay vs HubSpot: features, pricing, API/webhooks, fit for exterior-cleaning lead flow.
Draft workflow runbooks: lead-to-customer, team login and tool access, CRM touchpoints.
Define "single pane of glass": what lives in Payload admin vs external CRM/calendar; integration map.
Security framing for shared credentials (options: 1Password, vault patterns, Payload encrypted fields) - decision prep only.
Document internal-docs policy + CRM single-org / mixed-domain model (workflows/*.md, DECISIONS).
Scaffold app from Payload with-vercel-website; verify layout builder and public routes.
Seed and publish the real homepage and core marketing pages for the exterior-cleaning brand.
Plan a quick-edit admin path for reviews, testimonials, and before/after proof so staff can update trust content without code edits.
Launch checklist for marketing-site readiness: nav, CTA flow, form coverage, service areas, visual system/theme polish, and mobile QA.
Publish customer-facing trust/support pages in Payload for privacy, terms, refunds, and contact response standards, then link them from the public site.
Connect Payload to Supabase Postgres (adapter + migrations); document env for local and Vercel.
Create and verify the initial admin user in the real Supabase-backed database after approved migrations.

commands.command: Use scripts/bootstrap-admin.ts or the Payload admin login flow after migration approval

task.goal: Prepare Payload MCP and editor wiring so the same local app server can expose `/api/mcp` after approved schema work and local API key setup.

Split customer vs admin access flows so customer login stays customer-only, admin sign-in stays on Payload admin, the admin ops dashboard lives on `/ops`, and the customer portal nav stays focused on estimates, invoices, schedule, and account settings.
Lead forms + contact storage; shared first-party quote/contact/schedule/support submission path; provider-abstracted export/sync path so EngageBay stays default but HubSpot can be swapped in later.

commands.command: Payload form-submissions + active CRM provider sync; verify EngageBay in trial and keep HubSpot fallback ready

task.goal: Calendar booking and schedule request flow - use first-party forms with shared validation/helpers, customer portal schedule-change requests, recurring-plan cadence, and integrate the lead into Payload plus active CRM follow-up.
Calls / quote requests intake (lightweight); email visibility plan.
Sync Payload quotes into active-provider CRM deals so relationship management and follow-up live in the CRM, starting with a HubSpot write path.
HubSpot ops read path for admin `/ops`: health check, tasks filtered by local calendar day, open-deal pipeline sum (v1 cap 100 deals); admin-only API routes mirror `crm-provider` auth.

Customer portal account surfaces: estimates from Payload quotes, invoices, recurring service plans, service appointments, and self-serve account/contact updates with no docs/admin clutter in customer nav.

commands.command: See src/app/(portal)/dashboard/page.tsx, estimates/page.tsx, invoices/page.tsx, service-schedule/page.tsx, account/page.tsx

task.goal: Quoting system: internal Payload collection + env gate, plus draftable/publishable quote-settings globals that power the public instant quote math and service toggles.
Build and document the internal dashboard command center: KPI cards, chart, daily board, scorecard, milestones, asset guidance, and admin runtime controls like CRM provider switching.
Define KPI formulas and replace placeholder projected revenue, MRR, margin, and milestone thresholds with real business targets before moving them into editable app data.
Promote the dashboard scorecard from static docs/config into editable internal app data once schema and migrations are approved.

Payload CRUD for growth ladder and asset ladder (`growth-milestones`, `ops-asset-ladder-items`); portal tabs read from DB; Internal ops targets extended for KPI/scorecard tooltips and chart pipeline note.

Ops portal layout fix (single right column for all TabsContent), KPI row above command center, liabilities + scorecard rows collections with merge fallbacks, admin customer `/dashboard` preview + dual sidebar nav, optional `PORTAL_ADMIN_ONLY`, HubSpot task owner name resolution, planning/docs updates (D-ops-003).

commands.command: migration 20260325_005955_ops_liabilities_and_scorecard_rows; src/components/data-table.tsx, AdminDashboardView, app-sidebar; src/collections/OpsLiabilityItems, OpsScorecardRows; src/lib/ops/mergeScorecard.ts; src/lib/hubspot/opsClient.ts hubSpotOwnersNameMap

task.goal: Optional: internal admin API routes + portal forms for milestones, asset ladder, and liabilities if deep links to Payload admin are insufficient.

Wire ops scorecard/liability CRUD into the live dashboard, seed default rows so `/ops` is not empty, add scheduled-job reads to the day-board calendar, and move dashboard detail panels into the left rail instead of overlay sheets.
